'''Keos Myto''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] scout employed by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], who first discovered the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that was named [[Myto's Arrow/Legends|Myto's Arrow]].<ref name="Blaze of Glory" />
